title: Elbaf Reveals Its Giants
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Nami, Usopp, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Zoro as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: All right!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I knew this was Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've wanted to come here for ages!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: EVERY- THING'S SO BIG!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You Don't Say? Good for you. Now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if usopp knows yet!! Say, is there any- thing at the top of this tree?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The strongest country in the world and birthplace of war, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HEY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: For real?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being on Oldman Dorry and Brogy's Ship Earlier was crazy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's the first time I saw...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: A bunch of giants in one place!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guess it makes sense that you guys would be the strongest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HEY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Listen when I'm talking to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Garrrr

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the "Sun God" from all the legends we pass down on this island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't speak unless I say so, human.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Tell me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What do you think of my predicament?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It looks like...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...you got caught.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How shrewd of you. Their intent wasn't to merely catch me though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They wanted to sweep me under the rug! I've been praying for release ever since.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: CAN YOU BELIEVE IT'S BEEN SIX YEARS?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Six years?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm the pride of Elbaf's immense strength...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But these chains are made of sea stone, I can't unleash my power.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm bound here in Warland to "Treasure Tree Adam"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, I have a proposal for you, LOPPY!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: UFFY!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You wanna make a deal, Luffy?

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
